case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A VS. JITTCHAI THAMALANGKA

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100067070), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A SERVED SEP-18-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THAMALANGKA, JITTCHAI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THAMALANGKA, JITTCHAI $5,102.25 PRINCIPAL, $284.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,386.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100067070)
DECLARATION OF COUNSEL RE: 1. INTEREST, 2. COSTS (CCP 1033), 3. ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100067070) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-21-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100067070) AS TO DEFENDANT THAMALANGKA, JITTCHAI
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-21-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
